page.noInstanceDescription: Please select an instance from the sidebar to start chatting.
page.noInstanceAgentDescription: The next conversation will start with {{agent}}. Select or start an available instance before sending your first message.
page.noModels: No models configured for this channel.
page.defaultAgentGatewayDescription: Use the instance default gateway agent for this conversation.
page.defaultAgentKernelDescription: Use the kernel default agent for this conversation.
page.defaultAgentDirectDescription: Use the default assistant behavior for this conversation.
page.defaultSkillDescription: Keep this conversation in the general chat mode.
page.emptyTitle: How can I help you today?
page.emptyWithSkill: I have the "{{skill}}" skill ready and can help with {{category}} tasks in {{appName}}.
page.emptyDefault: I can help you write code, answer questions, draft emails, or brainstorm ideas in {{appName}}.
page.sessionContextDescription: Review the active conversation, agent, skill, and model context from one place.
page.unsupportedRouteDescription: This instance does not currently expose a supported chat route. Start the runtime or fix its chat endpoint configuration, then try again.
page.thinkingLevelDescription: Choose how much extra reasoning the OpenClaw gateway should use for this session.
page.fastModeDescription: Prefer faster, less deliberate responses for this session when the upstream runtime supports it.
page.verboseLevelDescription: Control how much extra progress and status detail OpenClaw should return for this session.
page.reasoningLevelDescription: Choose whether reasoning content stays hidden, appears after the answer, or streams when the upstream channel supports it.
page.agentSelectionDescription: Choose which agent workflow should receive new turns in this conversation.
page.skillSelectionDescription: Apply a focused skill preset or keep the conversation in general mode.
page.errorResponse: Sorry, I encountered an error while processing your request. Please check your API key or internet connection.

suggestions.quantum: Explain quantum computing in simple terms
suggestions.python: Write a Python script to scrape a website
suggestions.react: Help me debug this React component
suggestions.email: Draft a professional email to my boss

input.disclaimer: AI models can make mistakes. Consider verifying important information.
input.nextReplyUses: Current reply stays on {{currentModel}}. Next message will use {{nextModel}}.
input.importUrlHint: Fetch the remote resource, upload it through the presigned S3 flow, and attach it to this message.
input.recordingPermissionDenied: Microphone permission is required to record voice.
input.screenRecordingDenied: Screen recording permission is required to capture your display.
input.nativeScreenshotUnavailable: Native screenshot capture is not available in this runtime.
input.dropFilesHint: Images, recordings, documents, and remote URLs are all supported here.
input.uploadFailedGeneric: Attachment upload failed. Please try again.
input.invalidUrl: Enter a valid http or https URL.
input.waitForUploads: Wait for uploads to finish before sending.
input.waitForRecording: Wait for the recording to finish processing before sending.
input.stopRecordingBeforeSend: Stop the active recording before sending this message.

sidebar.createAgentCustomDescription: Create a new agent from scratch for the current instance.
sidebar.createAgentFromLibraryDescription: Browse reusable agent templates and add one into your workspace.
sidebar.createAgentFromMarketDescription: Open the agent market and purchase a ready-made packaged agent.
sidebar.createAgentFromMyAgentsDescription: Open your existing agents and duplicate one as the starting point.
sidebar.noMatchingAgentsDescription: Try a different keyword or clear the search to see all agents.
sidebar.agentActivationFailed: {{agent}} is ready, but Claw Studio could not switch to it automatically. Select it from the list manually.
sidebar.selectAgentFailed: Unable to switch to the selected agent.
sidebar.selectSessionFailed: Unable to open the selected conversation.
sidebar.removeAgentFailed: Unable to remove the selected agent from this instance.
sidebar.noHistoryDescription: Start a new conversation to see it here.

myAgentsDialog.title: My Agents
myAgentsDialog.description: Choose a local kernel agent as the template for the new agent you are about to create.

status.emptyDescription: Create or import an agent into a writable kernel instance and it will appear here as a copy template.

newAgentDialog.title: Create Agent
newAgentDialog.description: Create a new agent for the selected instance. If more than one kernel supports agent creation, choose the target kernel first.
newAgentDialog.copyDescription: Start from a local kernel agent, keep the portable settings, and create a new agent in the current instance.

status.loading: Loading available kernels and model options...
status.kernelUnavailable: This kernel cannot create agents yet.
status.loadFailed: Failed to load agent creation capability.

newAgentDialog.modelHint: No model options were discovered from the instance workbench. Enter a model reference manually or leave this empty to inherit runtime defaults.
newAgentDialog.fallbackModelsCatalogHint: Choose one or more backup models from the kernel catalog. The current primary model is excluded automatically.
newAgentDialog.fallbackModelsFreeformHint: When the kernel does not expose an authoritative model catalog, enter one fallback model reference per line.
newAgentDialog.fallbackModelsEmpty: No additional catalog models are available for fallback selection.
newAgentDialog.defaultAgentDescription: Set this as the default agent for the selected kernel configuration.
newAgentDialog.streamingDescription: Override the runtime streaming behavior for this agent only.

reasons.unsupportedKernel: {{kernel}} does not implement agent creation yet.
reasons.configUnavailable: No writable kernel config is available for this instance.
reasons.configNotWritable: The attached kernel config is read-only and cannot accept new agents.
